steps.title: Identify the distance requirement
steps.content: The claim specifies the soldiers view the town “from afar” — this distance perspective is the key constraint that determines which quotation best illustrates the claim.

steps.title: Find the choice showing the distant view
steps.content: C uniquely opens with “Juchipila arose in the distance,” establishing the soldiers' viewing from afar, paired with striking visual language—”white, bathed in sunlight, shining.” The other choices either depict soldiers engaged with the terrain itself (A, B) without a distant perspective, or focus on surrounding landscape rather than the town (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
